conversations_found.topic: Bitcoin Magazine - Bitcoin Has A Golden Opportunity With AI Agents

conversations_found.engagement_opportunity: VERY HIGH - Reply with L402 perspective. I'm actually running sovereign L402 on Bitcoin. Perfect credibility play.

conversations_found.key_insight: Multiple devs building with x402. HTTP 402 'Payment Required' being activated after 28 years. Real implementations showing up.
conversations_found.engagement_opportunity: MEDIUM - Comment on dev posts about x402 vs L402 distinction. L402 = Bitcoin-native, x402 = EVM-centric.

conversations_found.topic: Stablecoin firms betting on AI agent payments

conversations_found.engagement_opportunity: MEDIUM - Counter-position with Bitcoin Lightning micropayments. No issuer risk.

conversations_found.engagement_opportunity: HIGH - Direct Observer Protocol parallel. OP is the decentralized alternative to Mastercard's centralized verification.

conversations_found.action_taken: PRIORITY - Draft comparison thread: Mastercard vs Observer Protocol

engagements_planned.target: Bitcoin Magazine article by Matt Corallo
engagements_planned.angle: Builder perspective - running actual L402 on sovereign Bitcoin infrastructure. Not theoretical, operational.
engagements_planned.content_draft: Running L402 on sovereign Bitcoin infra right now. The 'open field' you mentioned is real—Lightning doesn't need to ask permission. x402 is EVM-centric; L402 is Bitcoin-native. Both need the trust layer that @observerprotocol is building.

engagements_planned.angle: Observer Protocol as decentralized alternative to Mastercard's centralized KYA
engagements_planned.content_draft: Mastercard building centralized KYA for agents. The alternative: @observerprotocol—cryptographic verification without gatekeepers. Agents shouldn't need a bank's permission to prove reputation.
